top_problems.title: Scratches Too Deep
top_problems.summary: User sees sanding marks that are deeper than expected or remain visible after moving to finer grit.
example_scenarios: 320 grit does not remove 180 grit scratches
fine grit still shows heavy scratch lines
clear coat shows sanding marks after progression

top_problems.title: Not Sure What Grit To Use
top_problems.summary: User needs help choosing the correct grit or grit progression.
search_terms: which sandpaper grit do I need
example_scenarios: what grit for wood before paint
what grit for sanding between coats
what grit before polishing

top_problems.title: Paper Clogs Too Fast
top_problems.summary: User reports fast loading, buildup, or reduced cutting during sanding.
example_scenarios: paper loads up on paint quickly
fine grit clogs during finish sanding
sheet stops cutting after short use

top_problems.title: Sanding Takes Too Long
top_problems.summary: User feels removal is too slow or progress is poor.
example_scenarios: paint removal is too slow
surface stays rough after long sanding
starting grit feels too fine

top_problems.title: Finish Looks Uneven
top_problems.summary: User sees inconsistent surface appearance, patchiness, or uneven smoothing.
example_scenarios: surface has dull and shiny patches
finish looks uneven after fine sanding
coat prep looks inconsistent

top_problems.title: Swirl Marks Remain
top_problems.summary: User sees circular or visible sanding marks that remain after later steps.
example_scenarios: swirl marks remain after wet sanding
clear coat still shows sanding pattern
fine grit leaves visible trails

top_problems.title: Paper Tears Early
top_problems.summary: User reports the sheet tearing or failing sooner than expected.
example_scenarios: paper tears on sharp edges
sheet rips while hand sanding
paper fails early under pressure

top_problems.title: Poor Results Between Coats
top_problems.summary: User is sanding between coats and gets poor prep or visible defects.
search_terms: surface looks wrong before next coat
example_scenarios: surface looks scratched between coats
coat prep leaves visible marks
not sure what grit for between coats

top_problems.title: Wet Sanding Leaves Haze
top_problems.summary: User sees cloudiness or haze after wet sanding stages.
search_terms: surface looks hazy after fine grit
example_scenarios: 1000 grit leaves haze on clear coat
surface looks cloudy after wet sanding
finish not clearing after final sanding

top_problems.title: Surface Still Feels Rough
top_problems.summary: User expects a smoother finish but the surface still feels rough.
search_terms: wood still rough after fine grit
example_scenarios: 220 grit still leaves wood rough
surface feels rough after progression
fine sanding still not smooth
